title: Overview of IIT Ropar M.Tech Admission 2026

detail.title: Overview of IIT Ropar M.Tech Admission 2026
detail.short_info: Apply for IIT Ropar M.Tech Admission 2026-27 before the last date 15 April 2026. Check eligibility, programmes offered, seats, application fee, and selection process through GATE 2024/2025/2026 scores via COAP 2026. Official application portal is now open.

content.text: Indian Institute of Technology Ropar (IIT Ropar) has officially opened applications for M.Tech admissions 2026-27. Interested candidates can now apply online for various M.Tech programmes across multiple departments. The last date to submit the application form is 15 April 2026.

Admissions are primarily based on valid GATE 2024/2025/2026 scores, and registration on COAP 2026 is mandatory for viewing and accepting offers. IIT Ropar offers M.Tech programmes in Chemical Engineering, Civil, Computer Science & Engineering (including AI), Electrical, Mechanical, Biomedical, Materials Engineering, and Autonomous Systems & Drone Technology.
Direct Link to Check Official Notification Pdf for IIT Ropar M.Tech Admission 2026: Click Here

sections.heading: Overview of IIT Ropar M.Tech Admission 2026

content.text: Indian Institute of Technology Ropar offers M.Tech programmes across multiple departments and centres. Admissions are conducted through a centralized process involving GATE performance and the Common Offer Acceptance Portal (COAP) 2026.

rows: Indian Institute of Technology Ropar (IIT Ropar)

content.text: IIT Ropar offers M.Tech in the following departments (seats are indicative):

items: Chemical Engineering -Chemical Engineering
Civil Engineering -Water Resources and Environment (15 seats), Structural Engineering and Geomechanics (12 seats)
Computer Science & Engineering -Computer Science & Engineering, Artificial Intelligence (15–20 seats each)
Electrical Engineering -Communication & Signal Processing, Microelectronics & VLSI Design, Power Engineering (15–21 seats)
Mechanical Engineering -Thermal & Fluids Engineering, Mechanics & Design, Manufacturing Engineering, Computational Mechanics (15 seats each)
Biomedical Engineering -Biomedical Engineering (15 seats)
Materials Engineering -Materials Engineering (8 seats), E-Waste Resources Engineering and Management (20 seats, joint)
Autonomous Systems & Drone Technology (Centre) -Autonomous Systems & Drone Technology (20 seats)

content.text: Candidates must have:

items: A valid GATE 2024/2025/2026 score + qualifying degree (B.Tech/B.E./M.Sc./MCA etc.) in relevant discipline with minimum 60% marks or 6.0 CGPA (55% or 5.5 CGPA for SC/ST/PwD).
B.Tech graduates from IITs with CGPA 8.0 or above (7.5 for SC/ST/PwD) are eligible without GATE in many programmes.

content.text: Eligibility and accepted GATE papers vary by department/specialization. Detailed criteria are available in the official brochure.

sections.heading: Important Dates for IIT Ropar M.Tech Admission 2026

items: Applications invited from: 26 March 2026
Last date for online application: 15 April 2026
COAP 2026 registration: Ongoing (Mandatory)
Tentative reporting/registration: July 2026
Classes commencement: July 2026 (tentative)

content.text: Note: Always check the official website for any updates.

items: Register on COAP 2026 and obtain COAP registration number (free & mandatory).
Visit the IIT Ropar Application Portal
Register / Login and fill the online application form (separate applications may be required for multiple departments).
Upload required documents (photo, GATE scorecard, mark sheets, category certificates, etc.).
Pay application fee through SB Collect (Punjab → IIT Ropar).
Submit the form and save the transaction details.

content.text: Apply Online Now Register on COAP 2026

Shortlisting is based on GATE performance. Final admission offers are made through COAP 2026. Candidates can choose Accept & Freeze, Retain & Wait, or Reject & Wait options on COAP. No separate written test/interview is conducted for the regular GATE-based process.

items: General / OBC / EWS: ₹500
SC / ST / PwD: ₹250

content.text: Payment mode: State Bank Collect (SB Collect).
